name: Editorial
description: A type-led longform system in the magazine tradition: near-black ink on paper-white, a serif display face, generous margins, and a single restrained crimson used sparingly. Built for essays, features, and stories that want the words to carry the design.
whenToUse: Pick when words carry the design: essays, feature articles, magazines, journals, longform content marketing, annual letters, manifestos. The chain reads as one continuous story — masthead, article hero with byline, serif body passages alternating with images, pull quotes, an image gallery, newsletter signup, footer. Paper-white ground, near-black serif ink, one restrained crimson accent. Avoid for product marketing, dashboards, or anything that sells rather than tells.
